name: k3_mebel
description: K3-Мебель CAD project: Python prototypes, .mac macros, API docs and plans. A worked example of a hand-tuned profile. Note the *.mac and *.MAC pairs: glob is case-insensitive on Windows and case-sensitive on Linux, so listing only *.mac would silently drop 351 of 1368 macros on Linux while looking fine on Windows. Duplicates are de-duplicated by the indexer.
